device_id.description: Unique identifier for the Raspberry Pi 5 edge device

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the alert was generated

severity_level.description: Assessed severity level of the patient's condition

clinical_summary.description: Natural language summary generated by Med-Gemma explaining the vital sign trends

recommended_action.description: Suggested immediate steps for the clinician

differential_diagnosis.description: List of potential causes ordered by probability generated by the LLM

raw_vitals_snapshot.description: A point-in-time snapshot of the vitals that triggered the threshold
